evals.name: lunar-landing-sizing
evals.prompt: Size the propellant for a 500kg (dry mass) lunar lander using a 320s Isp engine to perform a 2500 m/s landing burn. Assume 10% delta-v margin.
evals.expected_output: A report calculating a total delta-v of 2750 m/s and a propellant mass of approximately 700-750kg.
